items.titolo: Anthropic files for IPO — Claude maker races OpenAI and SpaceX to Wall Street
items.descrizione: Anthropic, the AI company that makes Claude, confidentially filed to go public with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission.

items.titolo: I've used Android Auto with Gemini for 2 months now - it's transformed my drives in 4 ways
items.descrizione: Gemini has made voice control in my car fun and useful, and I'm still discovering new ways to use it.

items.titolo: Anthropic Confidentially Files for What Could Be the Largest IPO Ever
items.descrizione: The AI giant behind Claude submitted paperwork on Monday that would take it public, just a couple of weeks after SpaceX’s splashy IPO announcement.
